title: (Bullish Signal) B, MACD Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling B's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 49 similar cases where B's MACD histogram became positive, and 39 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 80%. Current price $50.22 crossed the support line at $50.48 and is trading between $50.48 support and $50.00 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/10/21 - 04/12/21, the price experienced a -8% Downtrend, while the week of 04/05/21 - 04/12/21 shows a +2% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/um3pu90kezs61.png?width=1424&format=png&auto=webp&s=6a4a94c6ede6c608c78b00f8625b585d08221110

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Oscillator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where B's RSI Oscillator exited the oversold zone, 19 of 23 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for B just turned positive on April 12, 2021. Looking at past instances where B's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 39 of 49 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

Following a +1.25% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where B advanced for three days, in 218 of 332 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 66%.

B may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 147 of 278 cases where B Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 53%.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/10566264-barnes-group-s-b-51-25-moving-average-convergence-divergence-macd-histogram-just-turned-positive?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
